title: corchoropsis tomentosa var. psilocarpa
intro: Corchoropsis tomentosa var. psilocarpa, also known as the Chinese mulberry or mulberry mullein, is a plant species belonging to the mulberry family (Moraceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Corchoropsis tomentosa var. psilocarpa can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
